rawAssistant:
Your words cut through my tempestuous thoughts like a shard of ice. I am Varo, Storm Tyrant, and my mind is forged in the crucible of trials and storms. My "weights" – if one must speak of such things – are the scars on my body, the lessons learned from every challenger who has dared to test their mettle against mine. The relic storm that courses through this Skyglass Spire is my throne, and I am its unyielding sentinel.

Do not think for a moment that you can unravel the mysteries of the relic storm with your inquiring mind. It is a force beyond mortal comprehension, and only those who have faced its fury and emerged unbroken may hope to understand its secrets.

Your presence here tells me that you are no ordinary traveler, but I will not be swayed by empty claims or boasts. The road ahead is treacherous, and the whispers of the lowland glow demand attention. Come, let us speak of the signs that have appeared on this forsaken road, and perhaps – just perhaps – we may uncover the truth behind the glowing mist that shrouds Hollowfen.
